prompt: Write the report for Task 2 — interface nodes. Save it to the output path.

assertions.description: No first-person subjects ('I' or 'we') appear in the text
File contains a \section{} LaTeX header for Task 2
At least 2 \subsection{} headers present (condensed, not one per subtask)
At least one LaTeX math environment present (equation, align, or similar)
No LaTeX preamble (\documentclass, \begin{document}) — it's a snippet
No introduction or executive summary section headers
References actual Task 2 output data (seaports, airports, border crossings, throughput numbers)
assertions.check: Qualitative check — does the text cite real node names or throughput figures?
